name: worldgen-site-distribution-v3
description: Extends v2 with spatial topology metrics: cell_occupancy_entropy (seed sensitivity / clustering), isolated_cells_count (clumpiness), community_ratio (site-type composition), site_size_stddev (size diversity). All 14 metrics warning-oriented — no strict thresholds yet.
prompt_cycle: I am standing in a dense forest.
I am standing in a vast desert.
I am standing in a murky swamp.
I am standing in a snowy tundra.
I am standing in a grassy plain.
